title: antennaria pulcherrima subsp. eucosma
intro: Antennaria pulcherrima subsp. eucosma is a subspecies of the Antennaria genus, commonly known as a type of flowering plant, specifically a member of the sunflower family. This plant is used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Antennaria pulcherrima subsp. eucosma include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce inflammation, and support immune function. Herbal preparations of this plant are typically made into teas, tinctures, or infusions, and can be used to treat a variety of health concerns.
